scenario: A mount entry's referenced manifest itself declares a `mounts` array — recursive mounts forbidden
rejected_because: Per gap C5 / PRD-106-R18, mounts MUST NOT recurse. A mount manifest body MUST NOT itself declare further `mounts`. Recursion makes longest-prefix matching ambiguous and creates a discovery DoS surface.

mount_target_manifest_at_app_acme_com.violation: Mount-targeted manifest declares its own `mounts` array. PRD-600 MUST flag this.
